ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nutrients" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient */,
  "nutrient_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient */,
  "nutrient_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrient type */,
  "nutrient_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrient category */,
  "biological_role" TEXT /* Biological role of the nutrient */,
  "recommended_daily_intake" REAL /* Recommended daily intake of the nutrient */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the recommended daily intake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrients_nutrient_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrient_category_id") REFERENCES nutrient_categories ("nutrient_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrients_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrients_nutrient_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrient_type_id") REFERENCES nutrient_types ("nutrient_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., journal, book, website) */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_types" (
  "nutrient_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient type */,
  "nutrient_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_categories" (
  "nutrient_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient category */,
  "nutrient_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the database */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_nutrient_versions" (
  "food_nutrient_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food-nutrient version */,
  "food_nutrient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food-nutrient pair */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the food-nutrient pair */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_nutrient_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_nutrient_versions_food_nutrient_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_nutrient_id") REFERENCES food_nutrients ("food_nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_nutrient_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_hierarchy" (
  "nutrient_hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient hierarchy entry */,
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrient */,
  "parent_nutrient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent nutrient */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the nutrient in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_hierarchy_parent_nutrient_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_nutrient_id") REFERENCES nutrients ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_hierarchy_nutrient_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrient_id") REFERENCES nutrients ("nutrient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "data_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was responded to */,
  "response_description" TEXT /* Description of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
